lineage.Process: CreateFeatureclass C:\Users\lenovo\Desktop\王金玉\海南州附表2.3\贵德县隐患要素数据 贵德县隐患要素断面线 折线 # 否 否 "PROJCS["CGCS2000_3_Degree_GK_CM_102E",GEOGCS["GCS_China_Geodetic_Coordinate_System_2000",DATUM["D_China_2000",SPHEROID["CGCS2000",6378137.0,298.257222101]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],UNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]],PROJECTION["Gauss_Kruger"],PARAMETER["False_Easting",500000.0],PARAMETER["False_Northing",0.0],PARAMETER["Central_Meridian",102.0],PARAMETER["Scale_Factor",1.0],PARAMETER["Latitude_Of_Origin",0.0],UNIT["Meter",1.0]];-5123200 -10002100 450265407.001579;-100000 10000;-100000 10000;0.001;0.001;0.001;IsHighPrecision" # 0 0 0 # 与模板相同

SpatialJoin 贵德县\贵德县隐患要素断面线 贵德县\贵德县_XYTableToPoint C:\Users\lenovo\Desktop\王金玉\海南州附表2.3\贵德县隐患要素数据\贵德县隐患要素断面线和点连接数据.shp 一对一连接 KEEP_ALL "Id "Id" true true false 6 Long 0 6,First,#,贵德县\贵德县隐患要素断面线,Id,-1,-1;序号 "序号" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,贵德县\贵德县_XYTableToPoint,序号,-1,-1;名称 "名称" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,贵德县\贵德县_XYTableToPoint,名称,0,254;X "X" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,贵德县\贵德县_XYTableToPoint,X,-1,-1;Y "Y" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,贵德县\贵德县_XYTableToPoint,Y,-1,-1;TYPES "TYPES" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,贵德县\贵德县_XYTableToPoint,TYPES,0,254;rivel "rivel" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,贵德县\贵德县_XYTableToPoint,rivel,0,254;NAME "NAME" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,贵德县\贵德县_XYTableToPoint,NAME,0,254;PID "PID" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,贵德县\贵德县_XYTableToPoint,PID,0,254;RVNM "RVNM" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,贵德县\贵德县_XYTableToPoint,RVNM,0,254;RVCD "RVCD" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,贵德县\贵德县_XYTableToPoint,RVCD,0,254" 相交 "10 Meters" # #

ExportFeatures 贵德县\贵德县隐患要素断面线和点连接数据 C:\Users\lenovo\Desktop\王金玉\海南州附表2.3\海南州隐患要素断面数据\贵德县隐患要素数据\贵德县隐患要素断面线和点连接数据.shp # NOT_USE_ALIAS "Join_Count "Join_Count" true true false 10 Long 0 10,First,#,贵德县\贵德县隐患要素断面线和点连接数据,Join_Count,-1,-1;TARGET_FID "TARGET_FID" true true false 10 Long 0 10,First,#,贵德县\贵德县隐患要素断面线和点连接数据,TARGET_FID,-1,-1;Id "Id" true true false 6 Long 0 6,First,#,贵德县\贵德县隐患要素断面线和点连接数据,Id,-1,-1;序号 "序号" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,贵德县\贵德县隐患要素断面线和点连接数据,序号,-1,-1;名称 "名称" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,贵德县\贵德县隐患要素断面线和点连接数据,名称,0,253;X "X" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,贵德县\贵德县隐患要素断面线和点连接数据,X,-1,-1;Y "Y" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,贵德县\贵德县隐患要素断面线和点连接数据,Y,-1,-1;TYPES "TYPES" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,贵德县\贵德县隐患要素断面线和点连接数据,TYPES,0,253;rivel "rivel" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,贵德县\贵德县隐患要素断面线和点连接数据,rivel,0,253;NAME "NAME" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,贵德县\贵德县隐患要素断面线和点连接数据,NAME,0,253;PID "PID" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,贵德县\贵德县隐患要素断面线和点连接数据,PID,0,253;RVNM "RVNM" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,贵德县\贵德县隐患要素断面线和点连接数据,RVNM,0,253;RVCD "RVCD" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,贵德县\贵德县隐患要素断面线和点连接数据,RVCD,0,253" #

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.1.0'><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=C:\Users\HTHP-002\Desktop\dataCheck\2024年空间数据最终版\2024年空间数据最终版\16县隐患要素分布-隐患点\贵德县隐患要素数据</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>Shapefile</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>贵德县隐患要素断面线和点连接数据.shp</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>编号</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>255</field_length><field_is_nullable>False</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>类别</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>255</field_length><field_is_nullable>False</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>河流名</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>255</field_length><field_is_nullable>False</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>河流代</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>255</field_length><field_is_nullable>False</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>字段</field_name><field_type>LONG</field_type><field_is_nullable>False</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>
